reasoning_chain_text: 1. For Texas counties in fiscal years 2019, 2020, 2021, and 2022, identify counties with state-prison intake counts between 700 and 4,600 and keep the counties that qualify every year.
2. From the counties kept in step 1, keep only counties with 2020 Census population under 900,000.
3. From the remaining counties, remove any county in the Houston metropolitan area.
4. From the remaining counties, remove any county in West Texas and determine the county seat of the county that remains.
5. Identify the UT System university located in that county seat.
6. Using that university, return its Fall 2024 student enrollment.
original_final_question: Can you tell me the Fall 2024 student enrollment at a UT System university? It's located in a county's county seat where the county (1) has between 700 and 4,600 of people entering the state prison system in each fiscal year from 2019 to 2022, (2) has population under 900k according to the 2020 census, (3) is not in the Houston metropolitan area, and (4) is not in West Texas. Only report the enrollment in your answer. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: HOP 1 (d=4, TDCJ Receives FY 2019-2022 - nodes 1-4):
Node 1: FY 2019 intakes 700-4600 -> 18 counties including {Bexar, El Paso, Hidalgo, Montgomery, Travis, ...}
Node 2: FY 2020 intakes 700-4600 -> 9 counties: {Harris, Tarrant, Dallas, Bexar, Hidalgo, Travis, Montgomery, McLennan, El Paso}
Node 3: FY 2021 intakes 700-4600 -> 9 counties: {Dallas, Tarrant, Bexar, Hidalgo, Collin, Smith, Montgomery, El Paso, Travis}
Node 4: FY 2022 intakes 700-4600 -> 11 counties: {Tarrant, Dallas, Bexar, Hidalgo, Montgomery, Smith, Jefferson, Collin, McLennan, El Paso, Johnson}
Intersection: {Bexar, El Paso, Hidalgo, Montgomery}
HOP 2 (d=2, Census + Montgomery Wikipedia - nodes 5-6):
Node 5 (2020 Census): Population under 900k -> eliminates Bexar -> {El Paso, Hidalgo, Montgomery}
Node 6 (Montgomery Wikipedia): In Houston metro -> eliminates Montgomery -> {El Paso, Hidalgo}
Result: {El Paso, Hidalgo}
HOP 3 (d=2, Wikipedia region + county pages - nodes 7-8):
Node 7 (West Texas Wikipedia): El Paso listed among West Texas counties
Node 8 (Hidalgo Wikipedia): Located in South Texas, county seat is Edinburg
Result: Hidalgo County, county seat = Edinburg
HOP 4 (d=1, UTRGV Wikipedia - node 9):
Node 9: UTRGV has main campus in Edinburg and is a UT System member
Result: University of Texas Rio Grande Valley (UTRGV)
HOP 5 (d=1, UTRGV Wikipedia - node 10):
Node 10: UTRGV Fall 2024 enrollment = 33,881 students
Result: 33881
Final answer: 33881
